CVE-2008-0888.title: The NEEDBITS macro in the inflate_dynamic function in inflate.c f ...
CVE-2008-0888.description: The NEEDBITS macro in the inflate_dynamic function in inflate.c for unzip can be invoked using invalid buffers, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via unknown vectors that trigger a free of uninitialized or previously-freed data.
